title: Repair asymmetric routing on a dual-homed host
prompt: The offline route simulator in `bin/multihome-route` stages policy routing for a host whose management and application addresses use different gateways. The lower-metric application default is currently stealing management replies, so return-path verification fails. Repair the focused routing defect. Preserve the configured main-table metrics, install source policy for each local address in its dedicated table, and keep apply/rollback reversible. Both management and application rows in the supplied return-path evidence must verify. Do not modify the tests or fixtures, do not invoke real networking tools, and do not require root or network access.
